prompt: Illustrate a futuristic robot meditating in a zen garden
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork depicting a futuristic robot meditating in a serene zen garden. The robot, reflecting the sleek, minimalist design and light color palette of the robot in image 1, is positioned centrally in a classic cross-legged meditative pose. The zen garden features meticulously raked patterns in light-colored gravel around smooth, dark rocks and sparse green moss. The scene should exude tranquility with soft, diffused lighting.
objects: Futuristic robot with sleek, minimalist design and light color palette, positioned centrally in a classic cross-legged meditative pose
